01 About

VISUAL
STORY
TELLER

Aleksejs Iļņickis is a 15-year-old visual creator from Latvia with a passion for photography and videography. Behind the Instagram handle @alekseymedia.lv, he documents moments and builds his craft one frame at a time.

From photo shoots and short video clips to everyday life and rowing moments — his work reflects a genuine curiosity for visual storytelling at just 15.
